title: It Happened in Europe
writer: Béla Balázs, Judit Fejér, Félix Máriássy
actors: Artúr Somlay, Miklós Gábor, Zsuzsa Bánki
plot: A band of runaways and orphans of the war scour the countryside in search of food and shelter. They invade and then taken in by a musician and former concert pianist who's hiding out in a ruined castle. After the initial altercati...
